response.justification: While the candidate has extensive software development experience across multiple languages and domains, there is no evidence of professional C++ development on Windows or direct experience in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking — all mandatory requirements. His C++ exposure is limited to academic/bachelor's thesis work and outdated NI LabWindows roles, with no recent or domain-relevant application.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Demonstrated proficiency in CI/CD, testing, and DevOps practices
Active open-source contributor with technical communication skills
concerns: No recent or professional C++ on Windows experience as required
Lacks any demonstrated capital markets, fixed income, or banking domain exposure
Primary modern stack is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang, not C++/SQL Server/Oracle
